summary: Iteration 12: All 11 UX fixes verified - 100% pass rate. Tested: Settings/Collapse no overlap, Duplicate banner Fix All no overflow, No yellow/amber colors (duplicate is now red #ef4444), Toolbar buttons visible, StatsBar tooltips removed, Whitelist domain favicons, Help panel pill-style tab switcher + left-border tips, Tab Timeline new date format 'Day, Mon DD · HH:MM AM/PM', Workspace Activate/Deactivate toggle, Sidebar collapse/expand, Settings panel no header icon overlap.
passed_tests: TEST 1: Settings icon (x=317) and Collapse button (x=346) are NOT overlapping - confirmed by bounding box coordinates
TEST 2: Duplicate banner Fix All button within panel bounds (btn_right=371.5, panel_right=382.5) - no overflow
TEST 3: No yellow/amber text in duplicate panel - duplicate color confirmed as rgb(239, 68, 68) = #ef4444 RED
TEST 3: No yellow/amber text in StatsBar - confirmed by computed styles check
TEST 4: All toolbar buttons present (New Tab, Window, Domain, Heatmap, Focus) with text-foreground/60 color rgba(201, 209, 217, 0.6)
TEST 5: StatsBar has no Radix tooltip triggers (no data-state attributes), no tooltip popup on hover
TEST 6: AutoClose whitelist items have favicon imgs using Google S2 favicon API URLs
TEST 7: Help panel has pill-style tab switcher (class: 'flex gap-1 p-0.5 bg-secondary/50 rounded-lg'), 8 tips with border-l-2 styling
TEST 7: Help panel Suggest tab switch works, suggestion form visible
TEST 8: Timeline detail shows 'Sat, Feb 28 · 6:00 AM' format matching 'Day, Mon DD · HH:MM AM/PM' pattern
TEST 9: Workspace Activate button changes to 'Deactivate' after click, then back to 'Activate' after second click
TEST 9: Toast notification 'Workspace deactivated' shown correctly
TEST 10: Sidebar collapses from 380px to 0px width, expand button (TabPilot) appears
TEST 10: Sidebar re-expands back to 380px when expand button clicked
TEST 11: Settings panel opens without header icon overlap - collapse (x=346) is right of settings (x=317)
TAILWIND CONFIG: tp.duplicate confirmed as #ef4444 (not amber #f59e0b)
critical_code_review_comments: MINOR: TabTimeline.jsx line 149 - timeLabel bug: `h <= 12 ? ${h}:00 AM` shows noon (12:00) as '12:00 AM' instead of '12:00 PM'. Fix: `h < 12 ? ${h}:00 AM : h === 12 ? '12:00 PM' : ${h - 12}:00 PM`

MINOR: TabTimeline.jsx generateTimelineData() - activity value can go slightly negative (no Math.max(0,...) guard), causing 'Active: -1m' display in detail. Fix: `Math.max(0, Math.min(1, baseActivity + (Math.random() * 0.4 - 0.2)))`
seed_data_creation: N/A - Using existing mock data via useMockTabs.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 12 UX batch fixes all verified. Key changes tested: (1) Collapse button now in header flex row (not absolute) - no overlap with Settings icon; positions timeline=172, notes=201, workspaces=230, autoclose=259, help=288, settings=317, collapse=346 px. (2) Duplicate color #ef4444 red confirmed. (3) StatsBar plain divs with data-testid=stat-{label} - no tooltips. (4) AutoClose whitelist uses getFaviconUrl from @/utils/grouping. (5) HelpPanel pill tabs with bg-secondary/50 rounded-lg, tips have border-l-2 border-primary/20. (6) TabTimeline dateStr uses toLocaleDateString('en-US', {month: 'short', day: 'numeric'}) format. (7) WorkspaceManager has activeWorkspaceId state for toggle. Tab data MOCKED via useMockTabs.js.

mocked_integrations.Chrome tabs API: Web preview uses mock data via useMockTabs.js hook - all tab/window/group data is simulated

features_verified.9_workspace_deactivate: PASS - Activate↔Deactivate toggle works with toast notification
